source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260119 MC, 23G 캐나다 등록서류 요청- IDC/260119/참고 원본/DHF List 251001.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: DHF 산출물 폴더 순서와 설계개발 단계별 산출물, 문서번호, 실행부서를 나열한 목록이다.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Design History File 구성, 설계개발 입력·출력·검증·유효성확인·양산이관 산출물 관리에 사용된다.
keyPoints: DHF folder structure begins with 00_DHF Cover and continues through 08_Design changes.
Design input includes customer requirements, legal requirements, labeling requirements, manufacturing facilities and equipment, and supplier list.

Design output includes BOM, CCL and approval sheet, design specification, circuit diagram, software, technical document, label and packaging, user manual, DMR, manufacturing QC process, work standard, and inspection standards.

Verification and validation items include risk management, software verification and validation, cybersecurity, usability, performance test report, clinical evaluation, PMS and PMCF, biocompatibility, safety test report, EMC test report, and reliability testing.

Design transfer lists BOM, manual, label, packaging specification, firmware, FPGA RTL, detector driving software, drawings, approval documents, inspection standards, reliability report, and release inspection standards.

concepts.name: Design and development planning
concepts.evidence: 01_Design and development planning ,Design and development planning document

evidence.claim: The source defines a DHF output folder order.
The project code placeholder used in document numbers is XXX.
The DHF cover sheet document number pattern is A-DHF-XXX.
Design and development planning includes a design and development planning document with document number pattern A-DP-XXX.

reviewFlags.reason: Product model is not present in the source text.
Document date is not explicitly present in the source text; the filename contains 251001 but it is not treated as a confirmed document date.
Revision or version is not present in the source text.
Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text, although source metadata includes authoritySignal MFDS/domestic.
The source appears to be a preprocessed spreadsheet with repeated Korean and English table variants.

Some table variants contain inconsistent or duplicate wording, including Software Verification and Validation versus Software Validation, duplicated Cybersecurity Test Report rows, and an apparent typo 'Leagl Requirements'.
